formulas.name: Salutation Formula
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to address the recipient respectfully

formulas.name: Complimentary Close Formula
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to end the letter, followed by the sender's signature

formulas.name: Subject Formula
formulas.formula: Subject: [Topic or matter of the letter]
formulas.variables: Topic or matter of the letter
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to state the purpose or topic of the letter

formulas.name: Date Formula
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to indicate the date the letter was written

formulas.name: Signature Formula
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to authenticate the sender's identity

formulas.name: Format Formula
formulas.variables: Sender's Address, Date, Recipient's Address, Subject
formulas.notes: General format of a formal letter

formulas.name: Purpose Formula
formulas.formula: State clearly the purpose of the letter
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to convey the main idea or purpose

formulas.name: Tone Formula
formulas.notes: Used in formal letters to convey a professional tone
